title: Classic Macrame Hanging Planter
excerpt: The quintessential macrame project - a beautiful hanging planter for your indoor plants.

steps.title: Cut and attach
steps.description: Cut 8 cords about 3m each. Fold in half and attach to ring with lark's head knots.

steps.title: Create top section
steps.description: Divide into 4 groups of 4 cords and make spiral knots for about 15cm.

steps.title: Form the basket
steps.description: Create a net pattern using square knots, alternating cords between groups.

steps.title: Gather and finish
steps.description: Bring all cords together with a large gathering knot and trim the tassel.

tips: Test with your pot before finishing to ensure proper fit
Use a heavier cord for larger, heavier pots

videoTutorials.title: DIY macrame plant hanger tutorial | make a plant hanger without wooden hoop | boho plant decor
